visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen view. On the left, a pair of hands opens a plastic package of colorful round biscuits. On the right, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt, reacts with a surprised facial expression while holding a large mint-green thermos cup. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting a studio or well-lit indoor home environment. (2) The woman transitions to a single-frame shot where she is using her smartphone and making a phone call. She appears confused, touching her forehead and gesturing with her hands. The background is a clean indoor living space with a white wall and a light-colored door. (3) The woman excitedly shows a black Kangol duffle bag with a red and white tag. She reaches inside the bag and pulls out a white sock with a logo and a large transparent plastic container filled with light-brown round biscuits. She smiles broadly at the camera. (4) The scene shifts to a close-up of the woman eating one of the biscuits. She holds a small black microphone close to her mouth to emphasize her actions. The biscuit has a visible cream filling. She closes her eyes and smiles, indicating enjoyment. (5) In the final segment, the woman presents multiple products, including the Kangol bag, packages of Viva nuts, and the large box of biscuits. She points towards the camera and gestures enthusiastically. Various text overlays and graphics related to a shopping event appear on the screen, and the background remains consistent with the previous indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 只有台灣吃得到?. [Variety]: 第一次吃台式馬卡龍😂. [Subtitle]: 台灣路上看到的馬卡龍型態的東西?. (2) [Subtitle]: 韓國人第一次看到...真的好吃嗎😳. [Variety]: 實驗歐膩🇰🇷. (3) [Subtitle]: 到外面找看看!. [Subtitle]: 可是沒有.... (4) [Subtitle]: 欸 要買台式馬卡龍的話 要去哪裡?. [Subtitle]: 朋友: 你要去台北車站啊~. [Variety]: 阿公?. [Variety]: 阿嬤?. [Subtitle]: 朋友: 那邊會有一對阿公阿嬤在賣. (5) [Variety]: 阿公阿嬤..也太難了吧. [Subtitle]: 朋友: 不知道欸 要看運氣的(?). (6) [Subtitle]: 在蝦皮找到了欸!!!!!!. [Subtitle]: 買好了. (7) [Subtitle]: 裡面總共有18個. [Variety]: (很香). [Slogan]: FLUFFY BISCUITS À LA CUILLÈRE. (8) [Variety]: !!!. [Variety]: (韓國人會喜歡嗎? ...). (9) [Subtitle]: 裡面奶油也很香~. [Variety]: (我的菜). [Slogan]: 蝦皮517吃貨節. (10) [Slogan]: 5/13-6/18 獨家在蝦皮上架. [Slogan]: 限量販售!!. [Slogan]: 玩蝦皮遊戲再拿95折券. [Slogan]: 不限金額抽 KANGOL 蝦皮獨家包包.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt and later a pink t-shirt, appearing with natural makeup and an expressive personality.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor environment with white walls, a desk, a gaming chair, and a light-colored door. Some shots feature a sofa area where products are displayed.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin, expressing surprise. A slight plastic rustling sound is heard as the visuals show a package being opened. (2) A sharp, digital phone ringing sound effect interrupts the music briefly. The female voice transitions into a conversational dialogue with another person. The acoustic texture is clear and dry, typical of an indoor recording. (3) A digital 'click' sound effect triggers a new phase. The girl's voice becomes more excited and loud. The background music maintains its energetic beat. (4) A metallic 'zip' sound effect and fabric rustling occur as items are pulled from a bag. The music continues, providing a consistent rhythmic bed. (5) A loud, percussive 'crunch' sound, recorded with close proximity to the microphone, dominates the track. The BGM ducks in volume to emphasize the eating sound. The girl makes high-pitched sounds of approval ('Mmm'). (6) The music swells into a final promotional phase. Multiple 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects occur in rapid succession, synced with the appearance of text on screen. The female voice speaks with high density and authority about an upcoming sale.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Curiosity -> Search -> Discovery -> Experience -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote the Shopee 517 Food Festival by showcasing a co-branded snack ('FLUFFY' biscuits) and other limited-edition products. It uses a relatable vlog-style narrative where the creator discovers a local Taiwanese snack and shows how to purchase it on the Shopee platform.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly mentions the brand names, shows products with logos, and provides specific dates and discount information for a shopping festival.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines ASMR elements with social-media native editing to grab attention for a promotional campaign.
